product_name: Hot Wheels R/C Drift 'N' Fly Drone

bullets: AUTO HOVER - Effortless hovering technology keeps these kids drones steady mid-flight, making them brilliant for learning aerial control and stunts
2 IN 1 RC ACTION - Switch to drive mode and experience some super quick, super smooth drifting action!
FLIGHT FUN - This 2.4GHz drone is more than a drone – it’s a Drone Racer! Easy to fly, you can perform tricks and stunts to impress the crowd!
CRASH RESISTANT - With crash resistant guards and a durable foam body, this drone racer is ready to fly indoors or out! It also comes with some replacement parts to keep it performing at it's best!
OFFICIAL LICENSED HOT WHEELS TOY - This Drift n Fly Drone has the iconic Hot Wheels styling and is great for kids 8 years and above.
content.description: The Hot Wheels Fly N Drift Drone Racer is more than a drone – it’s a Drone Racer! Fly with Auto Hover – then remotely switch to drive mode with super smooth drifting action! Easy to fly, fun to drive and hard to beat! A must have for 2026.

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 x 2.4GHz Quadcopter, 1 x Handset, 1 x USB Charging Cable, 4 x Spare Rotor Blades, 1 x Screwdriver, 1 x Instruction Sheet

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.

_meta.source_file: New Item Setup Sheet 2025 - Bladez Toyz (January 2026).xlsx
